zh.lifeSummary: 當Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors於大約1130年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾時，他的父親Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis36歲，母親Gwenllian verch Philip37歲。他於大約1275年與Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis在威爾士卡迪甘史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1176年在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors于大约1130年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾时，他的父亲Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis36岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Philip37岁。他于大约1275年与Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis在威尔士卡迪甘史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1176年在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Geoghegan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Eamon, Eamonn, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Eochagáin, a patronymic from the personal name Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh, Eochaidhe ‘horseman’. Compare Caughey .

nameMeanings.name: Trahaearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

variants.name: Traherne
meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

en.lifeSummary: When Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors was born about 1130, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, was 36 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Philip, was 37. He married Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis about 1275, in Cardiganshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1176, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors est né environ 1130, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Philip, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis environ 1275, à Cardiganshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1176, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors um 1130 in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis 36 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Philip 37. Er hat um 1275 in Cardiganshire, Wales Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1176 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors è nato il circa 1130 nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Philip, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis circa 1275, nel Cardiganshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1176, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gorsが約1130年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wisは36歳，母Gwenllian verch Philipは37歳であった。約1275年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアでGwenllian verch Philip Gwisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1176年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Philip(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 웨일스 카디건실르에서 Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Llan-gors, Breconshire, Wales: Breconshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom
mg.Llan-Gors, Breconshire, Wales: Breconshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Philip, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis aproximadamente 1275, em Cardiganshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1176, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors родился около 1130 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Philip, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis около 1275 г. в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1176 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Trahaearn Ap Gwgan of Lian-gors nació aproximadamente 1130, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Philip, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Gwenllian verch Philip Gwis aproximadamente 1275, en Cardiganshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1176, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 47 años.
